refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall ensure operational availability meets or exceeds the customer-defined target by minimizing downtime and enabling rapid recovery from failures.
refined_fr.rationale: Operational availability depends on both minimizing failure occurrences and reducing repair times. Decomposing the availability KPI into sub-FRs addressing these aspects enables targeted design solutions.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure system uptime and downtime over the evaluation period; verify that availability metric (uptime / total time) meets or exceeds target.
sub_frs: Minimize system repair and recovery time

candidate_dps: Robust hardware and software design to reduce failure frequency
Predictive maintenance and fault detection to anticipate failures
Rapid fault isolation and recovery mechanisms
Redundant subsystems to maintain operation during faults
selected_dp.selected_dp: Robust hardware and software design combined with predictive maintenance and rapid fault recovery mechanisms

potential_sources: Interdependence between fault detection and recovery mechanisms
Interaction between hardware robustness and software fault tolerance
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP integrates complementary approaches with manageable coupling; interfaces between fault detection and recovery are well-defined.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate predictive maintenance data
Risk of increased system complexity impacting maintainability
High safety criticality requires rigorous validation of fault recovery
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing fault detection and recovery to reduce complexity and improve maintainability.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level responsibility for availability, integrating hardware robustness, predictive maintenance, and recovery functions

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Used to collect operational data for predictive maintenance and report system status

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives operational commands that may affect system availability

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends alerts related to system faults impacting safety and availability

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication for remote diagnostics and teleoperation impacting availability

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as availability is a system-level property; low diffusion risk due to centralized management.
Vehicle hardware contributes to robustness but does not fully contain availability responsibility.
Teleoperation affects availability via remote control but is a partial contributor.
Safety services interface with availability through fault alerts but do not own availability.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Availability KPI is best managed at the NGHE Solution level to ensure integrated control over hardware, software, and operational factors.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in managing cross-module dependencies within NGHE Solution
Risk of diffusion if sub-functions are not well modularized within the solution
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear sub-module boundaries within NGHE Solution to manage complexity and reduce diffusion.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR by addressing both failure reduction and rapid recovery, with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Risk of diffusion if availability logic is duplicated across Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Centralizing availability responsibility in NGHE Solution module reduces diffusion and improves ownership clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Availability can be verified via system-level operational data collected through Telemetry and Network Link interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of availability responsibility to NGHE Solution module with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Modularize internal functions within NGHE Solution to reduce complexity
Ensure interface contracts are strictly enforced to prevent diffusion

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignments sufficiently address the availability KPI with clear FR refinement, DP selection, and IM assignment. Verification and ownership are well defined, and risks are manageable.
next_level_sub_frs: Minimize system repair and recovery time

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level for detailed design.

assumptions: Predictive maintenance data is accurate and timely
System complexity can be managed within NGHE Solution module
open_risks: Potential diffusion if sub-functions are not modularized
High safety criticality requires thorough validation
evidence_needed: Operational availability data from system tests
Validation reports on fault detection and recovery mechanisms
